title: Arc Bookshelf
summary: This DIY bookshelf is made out of 3/4" MDF and features a classic arc shape.
description: This DIY bookshelf is made out of 3/4" MDF and features a classic arc shape.

materials.name: Box of 1 1/4" Kreg pocket-hole screws (see tools list)
Finish of choice - lime plaster paint used here

steps.title: Cut strips
steps.body: Cut four strips of 3/4" MDF 12" wide and at least 36" long.

steps.title: Cut shelf boards
steps.body: Cut two shelf boards between 24" and 36" long.

steps.title: Cut out arcs
steps.body: Cut out the side panels as shown in the drawing.

steps.title: Connect shelves to side panels
steps.body: Use pocket holes and screws to connect the shelves to the side panels.

steps.title: Add support
steps.body: Add a middle support between the 2 middle shelves with pocket holes and screws.
